author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Where Winds Meet - Imperial Palace World Boss "Cat Emperor" Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/where-winds-meet/

The Cat Emperor almost caused a disaster during a night tour of the museum! The trick to avoiding the guards? A crafty transformation into a distant cousin: the Lynx Figurine! Imperial Palace World Boss "Cat Emperor" arrives May 28 (UTC)! Come meet the Emperor in-game, Wanderers!

#ps5 #ps5games #wherewindsmeet

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game - Azula Character Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018989/

True power, the divine right to rule, is something she was born with. ⚡🔥

Azula's unraveling psyche and duality turns into her greatest strength, from poise and precision to mellifluous madness. Unlike a certain exiled prince, she settles for nothing less than perfection.

#ps5 #ps5games #avatarlegends
